input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.3.5.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.3.5.1
            TITLE: violations during the acceleration, skidpad, autocross events:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.3.5.1: Violations during the Acceleration, Skidpad, Autocross Events:
EV.3.5.1 Violations during the Acceleration, Skidpad, Autocross Events: 
a. Each run with one or more Violations will Disqualify (DQ) the best run of the team  
b. Multiple runs with Violations will DQ multiple runs, ex two runs with Violations DQ the 
two best runs

final_answer: rule EV.3.5.1: Violations during the Acceleration, Skidpad, Autocross Events: EV.3.5.1 Violations during the Acceleration, Skidpad, Autocross Events: a. Each run with one or more Violations will Disqualify (DQ) the best run of the team b. Multiple runs with Violations will DQ multiple runs, ex two runs with Violations DQ the two best runs
